incident_title: Claims stuck in pending after nightly adjudication
incident_description: Multiple professional claims submitted yesterday are still sitting in pending review after the nightly adjudication cycle. Support confirmed member eligibility is active and provider records look valid. The claim history screen shows edit package applied but no final disposition was generated.

incident_title: Incorrect denial reason showing for outpatient claims
incident_description: Customer support reports several outpatient claims are denying with reason code D421 even though the billed procedure is covered under the plan. The same providers had successful claims last week. Need review of claims rules or edit logic.

incident_title: Claim status API says paid but internal screen says denied
incident_description: The external claim status response is showing paid for claim searches while the internal claims workstation shows denied. Issue appears limited to claims finalized this morning. Business users are asking which status is correct before calling providers back.

incident_title: COB logic not applying to secondary claims
incident_description: Secondary claims with coordination of benefits are pricing as primary. The intake payload includes other payer info, but the adjudication notes do not show COB calculation. Started after the weekend rule update.

incident_title: Urgent: dental claims rejecting for missing subscriber
incident_description: Dental claims from two trading partners are rejecting with missing subscriber even though the member ID exists in membership. Rejects started around 03:15 ET. No enrollment batch failure reported so far.

incident_title: Manual claim adjustment fails with generic error
incident_description: Adjusters cannot save manual adjustments on high-dollar institutional claims. UI returns generic service error after clicking finalize. Browser console points to claim-adjustment-service 422 response.

incident_title: Duplicate claim warning not firing
incident_description: Operations noticed duplicate claim warning is not displayed when the same provider submits identical service lines within 24 hours. Several duplicates passed through to review queues today.

incident_title: New members missing coverage in portal
incident_description: Members enrolled through the employer file last night can log in but their coverage page says no active plan. Enrollment team sees active eligibility in the membership admin tool. Portal cache refresh did not help.

incident_title: Eligibility dates shifted by one day
incident_description: Eligibility inquiry shows coverage ending one day earlier than the source enrollment record for a small group plan. This is causing call center confusion for members with appointments today.

incident_title: Member demo update not saving
incident_description: CSR team cant update phone number or mailing address on member profile. Save button returns success, but the old values come back after refresh. No error visible to user.

incident_title: Dependent not linked under subscriber
incident_description: A dependent added through the morning enrollment feed is visible as a separate member but not linked to the subscriber household. Claims team needs household relationship fixed before processing.

incident_title: Eligibility sync delayed for new group
incident_description: New employer group eligibility file processed but members are not available downstream after four hours. Batch dashboard shows completed, yet membership search does not return the records.

incident_title: Member merge created wrong primary record
incident_description: After duplicate member merge, the inactive member became the primary record and active coverage moved under the wrong profile. Need membership data correction and merge logic review.

incident_title: Coverage termination not reflected
incident_description: Terminated members from yesterday's file are still showing active in the servicing screen. Source feed has termination reason and end date. Business is concerned about claims paying incorrectly.

incident_title: Provider directory search missing cardiology group
incident_description: Provider directory search no longer returns Northlake Cardiology for commercial plans. Provider admin shows the group active and accepting patients. Issue appears in production only.

incident_title: Provider portal cannot load authorization tab
incident_description: Providers can log into the portal, but the authorization tab spins and eventually displays unable to retrieve provider profile. Other tabs load normally. Started after provider profile service restart.

incident_title: Credentialing status not updating
incident_description: Credentialing team approved several providers this morning, but status still shows pending in provider maintenance. Downstream directory updates are blocked until status changes.

incident_title: Incorrect provider specialty on member search
incident_description: Member portal is displaying family practice for providers who should show endocrinology. Provider source table has the correct specialty. Issue seems isolated to consumer search index.

incident_title: Provider tax ID lookup failing
incident_description: Claims ops cannot find providers by tax ID in the provider lookup screen. NPI search still works. Error message says provider key not found even for active contracted records.

incident_title: Provider roster upload stuck validating
incident_description: A large provider roster upload has been in validating status for 90 minutes. No failure email was generated. Upload contains 2,400 records and blocks network update deadline.

incident_title: Network indicator wrong for urgent care locations
incident_description: Urgent care locations are showing out of network for two products, but provider contracting confirms they are in network. This is impacting appointment scheduling calls.

incident_title: Mobile app crashes on claims detail page
incident_description: Members on iOS 18 report the mobile app closes when opening claim detail. Login and coverage pages work. Crash began after the latest mobile release yesterday evening.

incident_title: Portal spinner after clicking pay bill
incident_description: Users can reach the billing page, but clicking pay bill leaves a spinner forever. Payment svc health looks green according to status page. Repro in Chrome and Edge.

incident_title: Benefits page layout broken on Safari
incident_description: Benefits summary cards overlap on Safari for employer group members. Data appears to load but page is unreadable. Call center is sending screenshots from multiple users.

incident_title: Search button not responding in member portal
incident_description: Member portal search button does nothing after entering provider name. No visible error. Browser console shows a front-end script error in providerSearch.bundle.js.

incident_title: Forgot password page shows blank screen
incident_description: Forgot password link opens a blank page for some members. Network trace shows static assets loading, but the reset form component does not render.

incident_title: Spanish portal content showing English labels
incident_description: Spanish language preference is selected, but several member portal labels changed back to English after release 6.14. Issue affects coverage, claims, and profile sections.

incident_title: Member portal slow after home page load
incident_description: Home page loads in two seconds, but navigating to any secondary page takes 20-30 seconds. Users report page eventually appears with no error. Looks like client-side routing issue.

incident_title: Premium invoice totals do not match ledger
incident_description: Billing operations reports premium invoice totals are off by a few cents for several employer groups. Ledger values are correct, but invoice PDF and billing portal show different totals.

incident_title: Payment posted twice for same member
incident_description: A member payment made through autopay was posted twice to the billing account. Payment gateway shows one authorization. Billing account ledger has two payment rows with same reference.

incident_title: Invoice generation failed for small groups
incident_description: Small group invoices for next month did not generate overnight. Batch job completed but billing dashboard shows 0 invoices created for SG segment. Large group invoices look normal.

incident_title: Grace period notice sent incorrectly
incident_description: Members who paid before due date received grace period notices this morning. Billing account shows paid current. Need review of notice eligibility logic before next mail batch.

incident_title: Refund queue not picking approved credits
incident_description: Approved member credits are not moving into the refund queue. Credits exist in billing account adjustment screen. Finance needs refunds included in today's outbound file.

incident_title: Autopay enrollment fails with valid bank info
incident_description: Members attempting to enroll in autopay receive unable to save payment method. Bank validation succeeds, but billing enrollment service returns business validation failure.

incident_title: Employer bill PDF missing adjustment section
incident_description: Generated employer bill PDFs no longer include adjustment details. Billing UI shows adjustments correctly. PDF output changed after last template deployment.

incident_title: Data lake missing claims partition
incident_description: Analytics users report yesterday's claims partition is missing from the curated data lake. Ingestion monitor shows raw file landed, but silver tbl was not updated.

incident_title: Eligibility feed has duplicate rows downstream
incident_description: Downstream eligibility table contains duplicate rows for members from the overnight enrollment feed. Source file has one row per member. Duplicate count is around 18k.

incident_title: ETL job completed but dashboard stale
incident_description: Daily ETL marked success, but executive dashboard still shows prior day membership counts. Data warehouse table timestamp did not advance after transform step.

incident_title: Provider extract schema mismatch
incident_description: Provider extract failed because field provider_network_code is missing in today's file. Vendor says no schema change was planned. Need data pipeline review and impact assessment.

incident_title: Late-arriving claim records not reprocessed
incident_description: Claims received after cutoff are not included in the late-arriving reprocess job. Records are in landing zone but absent from curated claim fact table.

incident_title: Null values in risk score feed
incident_description: Risk score feed loaded with null score values for a subset of members. Source file appears populated. Transformation mapping may have dropped decimal field.

incident_title: Data quality alert for member dimension
incident_description: Automated data quality check flagged a sudden drop in active member count in the warehouse. Operational membership screen looks correct, so issue appears in analytics pipeline.

incident_title: Claims API timeout above normal
incident_description: Claims status API latency jumped from 300 ms to over 8 seconds. Several consumers are getting gateway timeout. No code deploy reported for claims service today.

incident_title: Member elig endpoint returning 503
incident_description: Eligibility endpoint intermittently returns 503 for valid member IDs. Retries usually succeed. API gateway logs show upstream connection reset errors.

incident_title: API rate limit blocking partner traffic
incident_description: Partner integration is receiving 429 responses even though traffic volume is below contracted threshold. Rate limit dashboard shows the partner assigned to default tier.

incident_title: Provider search API missing pagination token
incident_description: Provider search API response no longer includes nextPageToken. Consumer apps can only show first page of results. Issue began after API contract release.

incident_title: Auth header rejected by shared API gateway
incident_description: Multiple services calling the benefits API are receiving invalid authorization header from the gateway. Token is valid when checked manually. Could be gateway policy regression.

incident_title: OpenAPI spec does not match production response
incident_description: Client team reports the production claim summary response includes field claimLineInfo as object instead of documented array. Contract tests started failing this morning.

incident_title: Webhook retries not delivered
incident_description: Event webhook delivery for claim updates is delayed. API platform shows events accepted but retries are not going out after downstream 500 responses.

incident_title: EDI 834 file not delivered to vendor
incident_description: The outbound 834 eligibility file did not arrive at the vendor mailbox. Internal job says file generated. No file found on SFTP outbound folder for the vendor.

incident_title: Msg queue backlog for auth events
incident_description: Authorization event queue backlog is growing and downstream utilization service is not receiving updates. Queue depth increased from 200 to 45k in one hour.

incident_title: Inbound lab results interface rejecting messages
incident_description: Interface engine is rejecting inbound lab result messages with segment validation errors. Sending partner says format did not change. Rejects started after interface engine patch.

incident_title: SFTP connection failing for payment file
incident_description: Payment file transfer to bank fails with handshake error. Credentials were not changed according to finance. Certificate on remote endpoint may have rotated.

incident_title: HL7 style enrollment messages stuck in retry
incident_description: Enrollment messages from partner gateway are stuck in retry status. Error shows destination endpoint unavailable, but endpoint health check passes manually.

incident_title: Duplicate events sent to downstream CRM
incident_description: CRM received duplicate member update events for the same transaction IDs. Integration log shows message replay after consumer timeout. Need confirm idempotency behavior.

incident_title: Outbound provider roster file has wrong delimiter
incident_description: Provider roster file sent to external directory vendor used comma delimiter instead of pipe. Vendor rejected entire file. Previous daily files were pipe-delimited.

incident_title: Production nodes unreachable in east region
incident_description: Several application nodes in the east region are unreachable. Load balancer marked instances unhealthy. Multiple apps impacted, not limited to one service.

incident_title: Disk space alert on claims app servers
incident_description: Claims application servers show /var/log at 98 percent usage. App is still running but logs are no longer rotating. Need infra cleanup before service impact.

incident_title: Load balancer returning intermittent 502
incident_description: Users across multiple portals see intermittent 502 errors. App logs do not show matching exceptions. Load balancer target health keeps flapping.

incident_title: Cert expiring on prod ingress
incident_description: Monitoring reports production ingress certificate expires in less than 24 hours. Several domains use this ingress. Need renewal before member portal outage.

incident_title: VPN tunnel down to clearinghouse
incident_description: Network monitor shows VPN tunnel to clearinghouse is down. Claims files and eligibility responses are delayed. Restart attempt did not restore tunnel.

incident_title: Kubernetes pod evictions after node pressure
incident_description: Multiple pods were evicted due to memory pressure on shared production cluster. Services restarted but latency remains high. Need cluster capacity review.

incident_title: Storage latency impacting document retrieval
incident_description: Document retrieval service is slow across claims and provider apps. Storage metrics show elevated read latency on shared volume. No app-specific error found.

incident_title: Database deadlocks in claims workflow
incident_description: Claims processors are seeing transaction failed errors when finalizing claims. Database logs show deadlocks on claim_header and claim_line tables during peak volume.

incident_title: Member database replication lag
incident_description: Read replica for member database is lagging by 18 minutes. Portal reads stale eligibility after updates. Primary database appears healthy.

incident_title: Connection pool exhausted on provider DB
incident_description: Provider service cannot obtain database connections during business hours. DB session count is near max and several idle sessions are holding resources.

incident_title: Slow query on billing account lookup
incident_description: Billing account search takes over 45 seconds for employer groups. Query plan changed and index on group_id is not being used.

incident_title: Database backup did not complete
incident_description: Nightly backup for reporting database failed with storage snapshot error. No successful backup exists for last night. Need database team review.

incident_title: ORA timeout during mbr update
incident_description: Membership update transactions fail intermittently with DB timeout. App retry works sometimes. Database wait events show row lock contention.

incident_title: Reporting DB table locked by long session
incident_description: Reporting refresh is blocked because a long-running session has locked the claims aggregate table. Analysts cannot access today's report data.

incident_title: SSO login loop for internal users
incident_description: Internal users are redirected between SSO and the application until browser times out. Clearing cookies does not fix it. Started after identity provider metadata update.

incident_title: MFA prompts not sent to mobile app
incident_description: Members with MFA enabled are not getting push prompts. Password auth succeeds, then login waits until timeout. SMS fallback works for some users.

incident_title: New hires missing production access role
incident_description: New support engineers onboarded today do not have the incident triage role even though access request was approved. Role mapping in IAM may not have propagated.

incident_title: Authorization failure after role update
incident_description: Provider users with billing admin role now get forbidden when accessing payment history. Role was updated yesterday to include new permission set.

incident_title: Service account token expired
incident_description: Batch job cannot call member API because service account token expired. Rotation process says completed but application still uses old credential reference.

incident_title: LDAP group sync delayed
incident_description: Access changes made in directory groups are not reflected in application permissions after two hours. Sync job status is unclear. Several managers cannot approve claims.

incident_title: Suspicious login attempts from blocked geography
incident_description: Security monitoring detected repeated failed login attempts against member portal from a blocked geography. Attempts target many user names within a short window.

incident_title: Possible exposed API key in application logs
incident_description: Production logs appear to contain an API key value after debug logging was enabled. Need security review and credential rotation guidance immediately.

incident_title: WAF blocking legitimate provider traffic
incident_description: Web application firewall started blocking provider portal requests with SQL injection rule. Providers are using normal search fields. Need security policy review.

incident_title: Critical vulnerability reported for deployed library
incident_description: Security scanner flagged critical vulnerability in a library used by the claims API container. Need confirm exposure and remediation timeline.

incident_title: Unexpected admin permission granted
incident_description: Audit report shows a user received admin permission without approved access ticket. Need investigate entitlement change and potential policy violation.

incident_title: Phishing link reported in support message
incident_description: Customer support received a message containing a suspicious link pretending to be the member portal. Need security team to review and advise response.

incident_title: Executive dashboard numbers do not match source
incident_description: Executive dashboard shows 1.2M active members, but membership operations report 1.25M in source system. Refresh completed successfully. Need report logic review.

incident_title: Claims aging report missing current week
incident_description: Claims aging report does not include claims received this week. Underlying claim table has records. Report filter may be using wrong service date.

incident_title: Provider perf dashboard blank
incident_description: Provider performance dashboard opens but all visuals are blank. Dataset refresh succeeded according to BI tool. Other dashboards in same workspace work.

incident_title: Finance extract totals differ from billing report
incident_description: Monthly finance extract total differs from billing operations report by $84k. Billing ledger agrees with operations report. Need analytics calculation review.

incident_title: Scheduled report email not sent
incident_description: Daily enrollment summary report did not email to distribution list. Report can be run manually. Subscription history says delivery failed with unknown error.

incident_title: Metric definition changed without notice
incident_description: Call center dashboard average handle time changed after semantic model update. Business says formula should exclude after-call work but report now includes it.

incident_title: Nightly claims batch abended at pricing step
incident_description: Nightly claims batch stopped at pricing step with return code 12. No downstream claim extracts were created. Operations needs restart instructions before morning cutoff.

incident_title: Enrollment batch completed with warning count spike
incident_description: Enrollment batch completed but warning count jumped from usual 200 to 9,800. Many warnings mention invalid coverage segment. Need batch review before downstream sync.

incident_title: Payment posting batch did not start
incident_description: Scheduled payment posting batch did not start at 01:00. Scheduler shows missed trigger, no failure record. Finance needs payments posted before bank reconciliation.

incident_title: Provider directory rebuild running long
incident_description: Provider directory nightly rebuild has been running for six hours and is blocking search index publication. Prior runs finished in 70 minutes.

incident_title: Monthly premium calculation batch used old rate table
incident_description: Monthly premium calc completed but appears to use previous rate table. Rate table deployment occurred yesterday afternoon. Need batch parameter validation.

incident_title: Claims extract generated empty file
incident_description: Daily claims extract job produced a zero-byte file even though claims finalized yesterday. Job log says success. Downstream vendor rejected the empty file.

incident_title: Deploy pipeline stuck waiting for approval
incident_description: Prod deployment pipeline is stuck in waiting for approval even though CAB approval was completed. Release mgr cannot promote the hotfix.

incident_title: Rollback failed for provider service
incident_description: Attempted rollback of provider service failed because previous artifact cannot be pulled from registry. Current release is causing provider portal errors.

incident_title: Config map not updated after release
incident_description: New API timeout config was merged and deployed, but pods still show the old timeout value. Pipeline logs say config applied successfully.

incident_title: Build artifact checksum mismatch
incident_description: CI pipeline failed because generated artifact checksum does not match metadata. No code changes in dependency module. Need DevOps review before release window.

incident_title: Production secret rotation did not reach pods
incident_description: Secret rotation completed in vault, but running pods still use prior database password. Restart job did not trigger. App will fail when old password is disabled.

incident_title: Blue green deployment routing all traffic to old version
incident_description: Blue green switch completed, but monitoring shows all traffic still hitting old version. New version is healthy but not receiving requests.
